objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 4 TypeScript Language Service bridge for definition-based call resolution, reference-aware impact, graceful fallback, and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving LSP definition resolution for unresolved calls, trace_flow exposes LSP target files, impact_analysis includes LSP-resolved callers, unresolved calls remain explicit, LSP failures degrade to AST graph, and production build pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 4 TypeScript Language Service bridge: AST call edges carry target identifier positions; TypeScriptLanguageService resolves definitions from indexed source snapshots; definition resolver upgrades unresolved call edges to resolved_lsp with targetFile/targetSymbol metadata and falls back to original edges if LS fails; chunking pipeline runs import/export resolver then LSP resolver. Tests cover namespace import property calls resolved by LS, impact_analysis and trace_flow using LSP edges, unresolved calls staying explicit, and LS failure fallback. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
